STANDARDIZED ADVISORY FROM GRAND INQUISITOR M. KING.

1. CONQUEST IS TO BE DESIRED.


2. SMOKING IS PROHIBITED WHILE ON DUTY.


3. DRINKING IS PROHIBITED WHILE ON DUTY.


4. FRATERNIZATION WITH THE ENEMY IS STRICTLY PROHIBITED.


5. STANDARD-ISSUE LAMPS MUST BE SNUFFED WHEN IN THE PRESENCE OF BLUE CANDLES.


6. FAILURE TO COMPLY BY NEXT INSPECTION WILL RESULT IN FORCEFUL DISCHARGE FROM THE GRAND ARMY OF THE EMPIRE, GRAND MASTER.
